title: Mike Fowler
compiled_truth: Mike Fowler is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-01), Mike Fowler sent 42 and received 49 emails, totalling 91 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (41), [Petej](people/petej-andrews-kurth) (19), [Sheila Glover](people/sheila-glover) (9), [Paul Pizzolato](people/paul-pizzolato) (8), [Jeff Kinneman](people/jeff-kinneman) (3).
